checks.action: Run install-all with user scope and codexcli target
checks.expected: User-scope destinations, unsupported combos warning+omit, exit 0

assertionResults.title: `install -y` project flow with defaults remains stable

checks.expected: Non-interactive project flow succeeds with project destinations
Version command exits 0 and prints af version

assertionResults.title: Interactive minimal selection translates to exact execution

checks.action: Start interactive install and cancel with Ctrl+C

checks.expected: Deterministic run succeeds and leaves no rulesync residue

assertionResults.title: Interactive and non-interactive parity for equal intent

checks.action: Interactive user-scope dry-run selecting all subagents
checks.expected: Completes and emits planned subagent outputs

checks.action: Equivalent non-interactive dry-run for same intent
checks.expected: Planned outputs equivalent to interactive run

assertionResults.title: Temporary rulesync artifacts are cleaned and reruns are deterministic

checks.expected: Both runs succeed with equivalent output

checks.action: Check rulesync temporary artifacts after each run

assertionResults.title: Project scope is isolated from pre-existing user rulesync state

checks.action: Seed HOME with pre-existing rulesync files
checks.expected: Project-scope run should not route via HOME staging

assertionResults.title: Install-all in no-language project degrades gracefully

checks.expected: Rules behavior explicit, non-rule artifacts still processed, exit 0

frictions.description: Interactive @clack/prompts output in pseudo-terminal contains heavy ANSI cursor-control sequences, making raw transcript noisy.
frictions.resolution: Used deterministic key-sequence automation and extracted stable markers (e.g., "Operation cancelled.", "[DRY-RUN] Subagent:") for evidence.

summary: Tested 8 cross-flow assertions: 8 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
